zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes於1426年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾時，她的父親Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes46歲，母親Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester28歲。她於大約1440年與Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes于1426年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾时，她的父亲Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes46岁，母亲Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester28岁。她于大约1440年与Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Forbes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Forbes in Tullynessle, Aberdeenshire, so named from Gaelic forba ‘field, district’ + the locative suffix -ais. The placename is pronounced in two syllables, with the stress on the second, and the surname until recently reflected this. Today, however, it is generally a monosyllable.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Firbhisigh ‘son of Fearbhisigh’, a personal name composed of elements meaning ‘man’ + ‘prosperity’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) in Connacht was famous for its traditional historians, compilers of the Book of Lecan.

variants.name: Fawbush
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which ispronounced as two syllables in Aberdeenshire. Compare   Forbush  .

variants.name: Forbus
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , reflecting thetraditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbush
meanings: Scottish: altered form of   Forbes  , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Altered form of German Vorbusch, a topographic name for someone living on the edge of a wood, from vor ‘in front of’ + North German Busch ‘wood, bush’.

variants.name: Furbush
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which is traditionally pronounced as two syllables. Compare   Furbish  .

variants.name: Forbis
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbess
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes was born in 1426, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, was 46 and her mother, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, was 28. She married Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty about 1440, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1460, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes est née en 1426, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty environ 1440, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes 1426 in Cromartyshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes 46 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester 28. Sie hat um 1440 in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes è nata il nel 1426 nel Cromartyshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty circa 1440, nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1460, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbesが1426年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbesは46歳，母Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yesterは28歳であった。約1440年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイでSir William Urquhart 4th of Cromartyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にフランスピカーディソンメで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes(이)가 1426년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1440년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes nasceu em 1426, em Cromartyshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty aproximadamente 1440, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes родилась в 1426 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty около 1440 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes nació en 1426, en Cromartyshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty aproximadamente 1440, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1460, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 34 años.
